creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
It's not only that a u-boot port is needed, we also need an ATF port for it, a port for the tools needed.
See http://wiki.espressobin.net/tiki-index.php?page=Build+From+Source+-+Bootloader

Not saying that it's hard but this is not your classical "copy any u-boot ports and replace the name/defconfig"
I have no plan to work on this.
